top_signals.title: Defense contractors would be barred from buying back their stock in bill approved by Senate panel
top_signals.summary: A bill the Senate Armed Services Committee approved would prevent defense contractors from buying back their stock without Pentagon approval.

top_signals.title: Gaming groups urge Congress to ban prediction markets sports betting in CLARITY Act
top_signals.summary: Gambling industry groups want the US Senate to step in to clarify that the Commodity Futures Trading Commission does not have the authority to oversee prediction markets.
